posts.text:
BREAKING STORY  - 

After a very public argument between Elon Musk and President Trump that has been unfolding throughout the day - Elon Musk just claimed to the world that the sitting U.S president is in the Epstein files and is the reason they have not been made public.

Follow Tiktok and Youtube for updates

This is a message from Alex the Editor:  
Dylan is trying to rebuild his fallen empire after his TikTok account, with a 14.9 million audience, was permanently banned without reason.   

Dylan’s official stance is that no guidelines were violated and that he is unable to appeal the decision. This has come as a shock to everyone who works at News Daddy Production, where we strive every day to bring unbiased, informative, and entertaining news to our audience.  

Even the Daily Mail put aside the r

One more for the @JDVance Meme collection - 

Therapist - "News Vancy isn't real and cant hurt you."  

Alex the editor -

🚨 What’s happening in the Congo right now will affect everyone.

Pt.1

Video

🚨HELP,  TRAFFICO , TERRORISMO - what’s the story here?

Recent satellite imagery has revealed a series of large, hand-made signs in Los Angeles displaying words like "HELP," "LAPD," "FBI," "TRAFFICO," and "TERRORISMO," sparking widespread speculation online. Located near train tracks and shipping containers, these signs have puzzled the public regarding their creator and purpose. An individual known as "@LAguy310"  took it upon himself to investigate. 

Upon visiting the site, LA guy confirmed t

🚨Breaking News: Tense Standoff Between U.S. and Colombia Resolved

In an unprecedented 48 hours, tensions escalated between the United States and Colombia over deportation policies. President Trump's initiative to use military aircraft for the deportation of undocumented migrants was met with resistance from Colombia, which insisted on civilian flights for repatriation.

In response to Colombia's refusal, President Trump imposed a 25% tariff on Colombian imports, set to increase to 50%, and enac

ALSO YOUTUBE COMMUNITY -  
Here is Non-copyright footage of Trump dancing to YMCA with a sword. 

Wild.

- Alex the editor

Video

🚨YOUTUBE COMMUNITY - here is the reference footage that I missed in tonights Youtube video regarding Trumps decisions on Tiktok.

- Alex the editor

Video

🚨 Insurance policies were cancelled before the fires started throughout California and here’s why -

Video

Los Angeles looks like the apocalypse after the second day of uncontained fires that have ravaged California resulting in billions of dollars of damage.

Video

🚨 BREAKING: Justin Trudeau resigns as leader of Canada's governing party after nearly a decade as prime minister.

Trudeau announced in a news conference in Ottawa today that he will remain as PM until a new Liberal Party leader is chosen, but he stated, "I cannot be Canada's best option if I am fighting internal battles."

Video

POV - You try to take a break for new year and 2025 is already cooked....

📍Chongquing, China,

Video

🇩🇪🚨BREAKING:  Horrific scenes in Germany after a reported to be Islamist terrorist Rammed a car into a crowd at a Christmas market in Magdeburg.

German police are searching for explosives in the car used by the terrorist.  11 people killed and 60+ wounded according to initial reports.

Video

is this the first war of 2025?

Video

RUSSIAS NEW FREE CANCER VACCINE FOR 2025

too good to be true? Maybe it is.

Video
What do you guys think about this?🤔
US Iran war day 13… 🚨 as always see you guys tomorrow 🫡
Kim Jong Un suffers from peace 😭🥀
It’s not WW3… but it is a war that’s now effecting the whole world…
US Iran war day 11… see you guys tomorrow 🫡
What do you guys think about Balen?🤔
9th March- You guys think he will escalate or de-escalate this war ?🤔
What do you guys think about this?🤔
US Iran War- day 9
US Iran War Day 7…
